channel.title: Joomla! Project — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Joomla! Project (joomla).

item.title: CVE-2026-65758 — Joomla Extension - tassos.gr - Sensitive data exposure in Convert Forms extension 2.5.0-5.2.2
item.description: Joomla Extension - tassos.gr - Sensitive data exposure in Convert Forms extension 2.5.0-5.2.2 - The front-end Submissions view did not enforce access control. An unauthenticated visitor could therefore list a form's submissions.

item.title: CVE-2026-65713 — Joomla Extension - regularlabs.com - Insecure path handling in Modals Pro extension
item.description: Joomla Extension - regularlabs.com - Insecure path handling in Modals Pro extension - Modals gallery paths could enumerate unintended directories.

item.title: CVE-2026-64873 — Joomla Extension - regularlabs.com - SSRF in Cache Cleaner Pro extension
item.description: Joomla Extension - regularlabs.com - SSRF in Cache Cleaner Pro extension - Custom query URLs could access internal or reserved network services.

item.title: CVE-2026-64871 — Joomla Extension - regularlabs.com - Inconsistent CSRF token checks / privilege checks in Cache Cleaner extension
item.description: Joomla Extension - regularlabs.com - Inconsistent CSRF token checks / privilege checks in Cache Cleaner extension - Administrator URL purges did not consistently require a valid token and cache-management permission.

item.title: CVE-2026-65757 — Joomla Extension - regularlabs.com - Inconsistent CSRF token checks / privilege checks in Modules Anywhere extension
item.description: Joomla Extension - regularlabs.com - Inconsistent CSRF token checks / privilege checks in Modules Anywhere extension - The editor popup could expose restricted module data to authenticated users without the required module permissions or valid reques…

item.title: CVE-2026-65755 — Joomla Extension - regularlabs.com - Date-sensitive query-cache leakage in Articles Anywhere and Users Anywhere extension
item.description: Joomla Extension - regularlabs.com - Date-sensitive query-cache leakage in Articles Anywhere and Users Anywhere extension - Date-sensitive query cache keys did not retain a bounded time component. Cached results could remain active across future publ…

item.title: CVE-2026-65754 — Joomla Extension - regularlabs.com - Insecure path handling in ReReplacer Pro extension
item.description: Joomla Extension - regularlabs.com - Insecure path handling in ReReplacer Pro extension - ReReplacer XML include paths could read files outside the site directory.

item.title: CVE-2026-64875 — Joomla Extension - regularlabs.com - IP spoofing vulnerability in GeoIP extension
item.description: Joomla Extension - regularlabs.com - IP spoofing vulnerability in GeoIP extension - GeoIP lookups trusted spoofable forwarded client-IP headers, this could cause GeoIP-rule bypass.

item.title: CVE-2026-64876 — Joomla Extension - regularlabs.com - Inconsistent CSRF token checks / privilege checks in GeoIP extension
item.description: Joomla Extension - regularlabs.com - Inconsistent CSRF token checks / privilege checks in GeoIP extension - Database-update requests lacked consistent token and Super User checks, this could cause unauthorized updates.

item.title: CVE-2026-64872 — Joomla Extension - regularlabs.com - Path traversal in Cache Cleaner Pro extension
item.description: Joomla Extension - regularlabs.com - Path traversal in Cache Cleaner Pro extension - Custom purge and log paths could escape the site webroot directory.

item.title: CVE-2026-65712 — Joomla Extension - regularlabs.com - Insecure path handling in CDN for Joomla Pro extension
item.description: Joomla Extension - regularlabs.com - Insecure path handling in CDN for Joomla Pro extension - CDN versioning could check file paths outside the site directory, exposing local file existence and modification metadata.

item.title: CVE-2026-65756 — Joomla Extension - regularlabs.com - XSS vector in Keyboard Shortcuts extension
item.description: Joomla Extension - regularlabs.com - XSS vector in Keyboard Shortcuts extension - Shortcut configuration accepted arbitrary inline JavaScript.

item.title: CVE-2026-64874 — Joomla Extension - regularlabs.com - CDN Credential leakage Cache Cleaner Pro extension
item.description: Joomla Extension - regularlabs.com - CDN Credential leakage Cache Cleaner Pro extension - CDN credentials were exposed in administrator request URLs.

item.title: CVE-2026-64799 — Joomla Extension - regularlabs.com - SSRF via remote image downloads in Articles Anywhere and Users Anywhere extensions
item.description: Joomla Extension - regularlabs.com - SSRF via remote image downloads in Articles Anywhere and Users Anywhere extensions - Content-controlled image URLs could request private or reserved network services, follow unsafe redirects and save responses wit…

item.title: CVE-2026-65430 — Joomla Extension - regularlabs.com - MaxMind Credential leakage in GeoIP extension
item.description: Joomla Extension - regularlabs.com - MaxMind Credential leakage in GeoIP extension - MaxMind credentials where leaked in request URLs, causing a credential leakage vulnerability.

item.title: CVE-2026-65431 — Joomla Extension - regularlabs.com - Zipslip in GeoIP extension
item.description: Joomla Extension - regularlabs.com - Zipslip in GeoIP extension - Geo IP database update archives have been broadly extracted without path validation, leading to unsafe file extractions.

item.title: CVE-2026-64793 — Joomla Extension - regularlabs.com - Content access and publication bypass in Articles Anywhere and Modules Anywhere extensions
item.description: Joomla Extension - regularlabs.com - Content access and publication bypass in Articles Anywhere and Modules Anywhere extensions - Content tags could use ignore flags or property overrides to render restricted or unpublished articles or modules. A con…

item.title: CVE-2026-64794 — Joomla Extension - regularlabs.com - restricted user-data exposure in Users Anywhere and Articles Anywhere extensions
item.description: Joomla Extension - regularlabs.com - restricted user-data exposure in Users Anywhere and Articles Anywhere extensions - User tags, filters and conditions allowed access to insufficiently restricted user fields. Crafted content could expose authentica…

item.title: CVE-2026-64797 — Joomla Extension - regularlabs.com - IP spoofing vulnerability in IP login extension
item.description: Joomla Extension - regularlabs.com - IP spoofing vulnerability in IP login extension - IP Login trusted forwarded client-IP headers without requiring a configured trusted proxy. Attackers could spoof the IP used for automatic login and potentially im…

item.title: CVE-2026-63265 — Joomla Extension - regularlabs.com - Inconsistent CSRF token checks / privilege checks in various Regular Labs extension AJAX endpoints
item.description: Joomla Extension - regularlabs.com - Inconsistent CSRF token checks / privilege checks in various Regular Labs extension AJAX endpoints - Privileged Regular Labs AJAX endpoints did not consistently require valid CSRF tokens, matching component/item p…

item.title: CVE-2026-63685 — Joomla Extension - regularlabs.com - Authorization bypass in DB Replacer extension
item.description: Joomla Extension - regularlabs.com - Authorization bypass in DB Replacer extension - Administrator routes and replacement requests did not consistently require Super User permission and a valid token. An unauthorized backend user or CSRF attack could…

item.title: CVE-2026-63280 — Joomla Extension - regularlabs.com - Inconsistent CSRF token checks / privilege checks in Regular Labs conditions manager
item.description: Joomla Extension - regularlabs.com - Inconsistent CSRF token checks / privilege checks in Regular Labs conditions manager - Conditions administration did not consistently enforce tokens and component/mapped-item permissions.

item.title: CVE-2026-64796 — Joomla Extension - regularlabs.com - various code injection vectors in Sourcerer extension
item.description: Joomla Extension - regularlabs.com - various code injection vectors in Sourcerer extension - Free did not require both the article creator and last modifier to be Super Users before executing article PHP. Pro did not consistently enforce configured C…

item.title: CVE-2026-63683 — Joomla Extension - regularlabs.com - Client IP spoofing vulnerability in Regular Labs conditions manager
item.description: Joomla Extension - regularlabs.com - Client IP spoofing vulnerability in Regular Labs conditions manager - IP and GeoIP conditions trusted spoofable forwarded headers, allowing remote clients to bypass location-based rules.

item.title: CVE-2026-64798 — Joomla Extension - regularlabs.com - Insecure login URL keys in IP login extension
item.description: Joomla Extension - regularlabs.com - Insecure login URL keys in IP login extension - Persistent URL login keys were also generated using a non-cryptographic random generator with insufficient entropy.

item.title: CVE-2026-64795 — Joomla Extension - regularlabs.com - XSS vectors in tag-provided inputs in various Regular Labs extensions
item.description: Joomla Extension - regularlabs.com - XSS vectors in tag-provided inputs in various Regular Labs extensions - Tag-provided custom HTML, module content/title overrides and decoded modal or tooltip values could execute unsafe markup. A content author co…

item.title: CVE-2026-64792 — Joomla Extension - regularlabs.com - disclosure of restricted content via search index in various Regular Labs extensions
item.description: Joomla Extension - regularlabs.com - disclosure of restricted content via search index in various Regular Labs extensions - Smart Search indexing could render generated content using the indexing administrator’s identity instead of a public guest. Re…

item.title: CVE-2026-63281 — Joomla Extension - regularlabs.com - XSS vulnerability in Regular Labs conditions manager
item.description: Joomla Extension - regularlabs.com - XSS vulnerability in Regular Labs conditions manager - Stored condition values could also execute HTML/JavaScript in administrator summaries.

item.title: CVE-2026-64791 — Joomla Extension - regularlabs.com - Inconsistent CSRF token checks / privilege checks in Regular Labs Extension Manager
item.description: Joomla Extension - regularlabs.com - Inconsistent CSRF token checks / privilege checks in Regular Labs Extension Manager - Administrator routes and install/update/uninstall processing did not consistently enforce component-management and installation…

item.title: CVE-2026-63684 — Joomla Extension - regularlabs.com - Inconsistent CSRF token checks / privilege checks in various admin/import/export actions of multiple Regular Labs extension
item.description: Joomla Extension - regularlabs.com - Inconsistent CSRF token checks / privilege checks in various admin/import/export actions of multiple Regular Labs extension - Administrator actions, editor popups and import/export requests lacked consistent token…

item.title: CVE-2026-63264 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Joomla Extension - joomshopping.com - Reflective XSS in JoomShopping < 5.9.3
item.description: Joomla Extension - joomshopping.com - Reflective XSS in JoomShopping < 5.9.3 - The Joomla extension JoomShopping is vulnerable to an reflected XSS vulnerability in the product frontend controller.

item.title: CVE-2026-63048 · 9.4 CRITICAL — Joomla Extension - joomlack.fr - Improper access control in Page Builder CK < 3.6.2
item.description: Joomla Extension - joomlack.fr - Improper access control in Page Builder CK < 3.6.2 - The Joomla extension Page Builder CK is vulnerable to an authenticated arbitrary file upload, leading to RCE.

item.title: CVE-2026-63047 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Joomla Extension - joomdonation.com - Invoice data exfiltration via incorrect ACL check in Events Booking 5.0.0-5.8.1
item.description: Joomla Extension - joomdonation.com - Invoice data exfiltration via incorrect ACL check in Events Booking 5.0.0-5.8.1 - The Joomla extension Events Booking prior version 5.0-5.8.1 did not properly verify that an actor is allowed to download invoice i…

item.title: CVE-2026-62415 · 9.1 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Joomla Extension - joomdonation.com - Insecure default configuration Membership Pro < 4.6.2
item.description: Joomla Extension - joomdonation.com - Insecure default configuration Membership Pro < 4.6.2 - The Joomla extension Membership Pro prior version 4.6.2 did by default allow unauthenticated users to upload media assets.

item.title: CVE-2026-61425 · 9.4 CRITICAL — Joomla Extension - balbooa.com - Authentication bypass in Gridbox < 1.6.0
item.description: Joomla Extension - balbooa.com - Authentication bypass in Gridbox < 1.6.0 - The Joomla extension Gridbox is vulnerable an authenticated bypass, potentially leading to full admin access.

item.title: CVE-2026-61424 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Joomla Extension - dj-extensions.com - Unauthenticated arbitrary file upload in DJ-Classifieds < 3.11.2
item.description: Joomla Extension - dj-extensions.com - Unauthenticated arbitrary file upload in DJ-Classifieds < 3.11.2 - The Joomla extension DJ-Classifieds is vulnerable to an unauthenticated file upload, leading to full RCE.

item.title: CVE-2026-62414 · 9.1 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Joomla Extension - joomlack.fr - Improper access control in Page Builder CK < 3.6.2
item.description: Joomla Extension - joomlack.fr - Improper access control in Page Builder CK < 3.6.2 - The Joomla extension Page Builder CK does not properly apply access control to frontend page list views.

item.title: CVE-2026-61900 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Joomla Extension - dj-extensions.com - Unauthenticated arbitrary file upload in DJ-jDownloads < 4.1.6
item.description: Joomla Extension - dj-extensions.com - Unauthenticated arbitrary file upload in DJ-jDownloads < 4.1.6 - The Joomla extension JDownloads is vulnerable to an unauthenticated file upload, leading to full RCE.

item.title: CVE-2026-61901 · 6.1 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Joomla Extension - hikashop.com - Open redirect in Hikashop < 6.5.2
item.description: Joomla Extension - hikashop.com - Open redirect in Hikashop < 6.5.2 - The Joomla extension Hikashop is vulnerable to an open redirect.

item.title: CVE-2026-60027 · 8.7 HIGH 🌩️ — Joomla Extension - themexpert.com - Unauthenticated path traversal / file read in Quix Page Builder < 6.2.1
item.description: Joomla Extension - themexpert.com - Unauthenticated path traversal / file read in Quix Page Builder < 6.2.1 - The Joomla extension Quix Page Builder Pro is vulnerable to a unauthenticated path traversal via form elements. Unauthenticated users fronte…

item.title: CVE-2026-60031 · 6.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Joomla Extension - themexpert.com - Information disclosure in Quix Page Builder < 6.2.1
item.description: Joomla Extension - themexpert.com - Information disclosure in Quix Page Builder < 6.2.1 - The Joomla extension Quix Page Builder Pro is vulnerable to an information disclosure. Raw exceptions reflected in AJAX handler responses.

item.title: CVE-2026-60029 · 5.1 MEDIUM — Joomla Extension - themexpert.com - Authenticated stored XSS in Quix Page Builder < 6.2.1
item.description: Joomla Extension - themexpert.com - Authenticated stored XSS in Quix Page Builder < 6.2.1 - The Joomla extension Quix Page Builder Pro is vulnerable to an authenticated stored XSS vulnerability. Authenticated builder users could break out of id/class…

item.title: CVE-2026-60026 · 8.9 HIGH — Joomla Extension - themexpert.com - Authenticated PHP code execution in Quix Page Builder < 6.2.1
item.description: Joomla Extension - themexpert.com - Authenticated PHP code execution in Quix Page Builder < 6.2.1 - The Joomla extension Quix Page Builder Pro is vulnerable to an authenticated PHP code execution. Authenticated builder user (core.create/core.edit) co…

item.title: CVE-2026-60034 · 9.4 CRITICAL — Joomla Extension - themexpert.com - Authenticated stored XSS in JMedia Extension < 1.6.0
item.description: Joomla Extension - themexpert.com - Authenticated stored XSS in JMedia Extension < 1.6.0 - The Joomla extension JMedia is vulnerable to a stored XSS vulnerability. Unsanitised SVG uploads served without nosniff, leading to stored/reflected XSS.

item.title: CVE-2026-60030 · 8.7 HIGH 🌩️ — Joomla Extension - themexpert.com - Broken Access Control for media management in Quix Page Builder < 6.2.1
item.description: Joomla Extension - themexpert.com - Broken Access Control for media management in Quix Page Builder < 6.2.1 - The Joomla extension Quix Page Builder Pro is vulnerable to an improper access control. Authenticated users could upload media files regardl…

item.title: CVE-2026-60033 · 5.1 MEDIUM — Joomla Extension - themexpert.com - SSRF via remote download in JMedia Extension < 1.6.0
item.description: Joomla Extension - themexpert.com - SSRF via remote download in JMedia Extension < 1.6.0 - The Joomla extension JMedia is vulnerable to an SSRF vulnerability. Remote-URL download could target internal/reserved addresses.

item.title: CVE-2026-60032 · 9.4 CRITICAL — Joomla Extension - themexpert.com - Authenticated arbitrary file upload in JMedia < 1.6.0
item.description: Joomla Extension - themexpert.com - Authenticated arbitrary file upload in JMedia < 1.6.0 - The Joomla extension JMedia is vulnerable to an authenticated arbitrary file upload, leading to RCE. Executable uploads/writes possible (incl. polyglot filena…

item.title: CVE-2026-60028 · 8.6 HIGH — Joomla Extension - themexpert.com - Authenticated stored XSS in Quix Page Builder < 6.2.1
item.description: Joomla Extension - themexpert.com - Authenticated stored XSS in Quix Page Builder < 6.2.1 - The Joomla extension Quix Page Builder Pro is vulnerable to an authenticated stored XSS vulnerability. Authenticated builder user could inject scripts, fires…

item.title: CVE-2026-58148 · 8.7 HIGH 🌩️ — Joomla Extension - chronoengine.com - Stored XSS in ChronoForms extension for Joomla 8.0 - 8.0.52
item.description: Joomla Extension - chronoengine.com - Stored XSS in ChronoForms extension for Joomla 8.0 - 8.0.52 - The Joomla extension ChronoForms is vulnerable to an unauthenticated stored XSS vulnerability.

item.title: CVE-2026-60024 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Joomla Extension - joomdonation.com - Insecure default configuration Events Booking < 5.8.0
item.description: Joomla Extension - joomdonation.com - Insecure default configuration Events Booking < 5.8.0 - The Joomla extension Events Booking prior version 5.8.0 did by default allow unauthenticated users to upload media assets.
